title: bidens tetragona
intro: Bidens tetragona, also known as the four-angled beggarticks, is a plant species in the daisy family that is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Bidens tetragona are attributed to its leaves and stems, which contain flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bidens tetragona include its potential to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as respiratory problems, wounds, and digestive issues. Bidens tetragona can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used as a topical application to utilize its medicinal properties.
